title: Intersect Update Committee Schema
description: Schema for Update Committee governance actions, aligned with CIP-100/108/116/169 and the shared schemas/update-committee/common.jsonld @context.

hashAlgorithm.title: Hash Algorithm
hashAlgorithm.description: The algorithm used to authenticate this document externally (CIP-100)

authors.title: Authors
authors.description: The authors of this governance metadata (CIP-100). At least one signing author is required.

author.title: Author
author.description: An author endorsing the content of a metadata document (CIP-100).

witness.title: Witness
witness.description: A witness proving that the author endorses the content of the metadata. Both plain ed25519 and CIP-0008 (message-signing) witnesses are accepted.

body.title: Body
body.description: The body of the metadata document that is hashed to produce a signature.

title.title: Title
title.description: A brief introduction to the motivation for the governance action

abstract.title: Abstract
abstract.description: A concise summary of the motivation and rationale for the governance action

motivation.title: Motivation
motivation.description: Context around the problem being addressed by the on-chain action

rationale.title: Rationale
rationale.description: Explanation of how the governance action addresses the problem outlined in 'motivation'

onChain.title: On-chain Effect
onChain.description: CIP-116 ProposalProcedure embedded within the body of the action (CIP-169 onChain extension).

deposit.title: Deposit
deposit.description: Governance action deposit amount in lovelace; CIP-116 UInt64 encoded as a JSON string.

reward_account.title: Reward Account
reward_account.description: Bech32-encoded stake address where the deposit is returned; CIP-116 RewardAddress.

govAction.title: Update Committee Governance Action
govAction.description: CIP-116 update_committee. Adds new members (with term-expiry epochs), optionally removes existing members, and sets the committee signature threshold. `gov_action_id` is omitted on the very first update_committee action in a chain (CIP-1694) and is present otherwise.

members_to_remove.title: Members to Remove
members_to_remove.description: Cold credentials of committee members to remove. May be empty or omitted.

committee.title: Committee Members to Add
committee.description: Members to add to the committee, each as a (cold-credential, term-expiry-epoch) pair. May be empty if the action only removes members or only changes the threshold.

govActionId.title: Governance Action ID
govActionId.description: Reference to the previous update_committee governance action this proposal extends; CIP-116 GovActionId.

gov_action_index.title: Governance Action Index
gov_action_index.description: Index of the action within its containing transaction; CIP-116 UInt16 encoded as a JSON string.

credential.title: Credential
credential.description: CIP-116 Credential. A discriminated pair: `tag` selects pubkey-hash vs script-hash, `value` is the 28-byte hash as 56 lowercase hex characters (CIP-116 Ed25519KeyHash / ScriptHash).

committeeMember.title: Committee Member
committeeMember.description: A single (cold-credential, term-expiry-epoch) pair. The epoch is the absolute epoch number at which the member's term ends (CIP-1694).

value.title: Term Expiry Epoch
value.description: Absolute epoch number at which this member's term expires; CIP-116 UInt64 encoded as a JSON string.

unitInterval.title: Unit Interval
unitInterval.description: A rational in [0, 1]; CIP-116 UnitInterval. Used here for the committee signature threshold.

referenceHash.title: Reference Hash
referenceHash.description: A hash of a reference document
